title: Indifi Technologies Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Indifi Technologies Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Indifi Technologies Holdings Services:
Indifi Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies Holdings Services!
